items.title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
items.summary: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.

items.title: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
items.summary: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.

items.title: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
items.summary: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 中國新法究責「海外批評者」 矢板明夫：最可憐的是這群人！
items.summary: 中國3月12日通過《中華人民共和國民族團結進步促進法》，預計7月1日實施，引發國際輿論熱議。印太戰略智庫執行長矢板明夫表示，這部法律真正的目的是「嚇人」，只要讓大家相信「說錯話可...…

items.title: 法國出現攝氏21.6度最熱夏夜 熱浪來襲40人消暑溺斃
items.summary: 法國昨天夜間至今天清晨前經歷自有紀錄以來最炎熱的夜晚。總理勒克努表示，自6月18日遭嚴峻熱浪籠罩以來，已有40人溺斃，其中多數為年輕人。  法新社報導，這波致命的熱浪自上週起持續肆虐法國...…

items.title: 中網瘋傳對店員喊「我是你爸爸」送套餐？麥當勞急闢謠：AI假廣告
items.summary: 本月21日是國際多數國家的父親節，中網瘋傳到境內麥當勞門市對店員喊「我是你爸爸」就能免費領套餐，許多中國網友真的去做了才發現被假消息欺騙，中國麥當勞官方也趕緊出面闢謠。  旅...…
